title: Current U.S. Inflation Rate Is 2.4%: Chart and Why It Matters
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The current U.S. inflation rate is 2.4% as of May 2024, the lowest in over three years. This rate is below the Federal Reserve's long-term target of 2%. It indi
excerpt: The current U.S. inflation rate is 2.4% as of May 2024, the lowest in over three years. This rate is below the Federal Reserve's long-term target of 2%. It indicates a stable economic environment.

content.introduction: The current U.S. inflation rate is 2.4% as of May 2024, the lowest in over three years. This rate is below the Federal Reserve's long-term target of 2%. It indicates a stable economic environment.
